resultList.dtldesc: Discover the perfect blend of comfort and style with this stunning 3 BHK flat for sale in Keerthi Royal Palms, Electronic City, Bangalore. Boasting an expansive super built-up area of 1745 sqft, this beautifully designed apartment is located on the 3rd floor of a modern 12-floor building that is Vaastu compliant and features a desirable north-facing orientation, ensuring a harmonious living environment.::::::Property specifications and facilities::::::This semi-furnished residence includes essential fixtures such as wardrobes, lights, and fans. It comprises three spacious bedrooms and three bathrooms—two attached and one common—all fitted with modern western amenities and geysers. The open-plan living cum dining area is perfect for entertaining, complemented by three balconies: two attached to the bedrooms and one linked to the hall, providing refreshing views of the surrounding area. The modular kitchen, equipped with a chimney and an attached utility area, adds a touch of convenience to your daily cooking experience. Elegant vitrified tiles adorn the flooring, enhancing the overall aesthetic.::::::Residents will enjoy the benefits of two covered parking spaces and a reliable water supply from both borewell and corporation sources. The property is equipped with 100% power backup to ensure comfort during outages, alongside the assurance of a security guard and CCTV surveillance for added safety. The building features two lifts for easy access to all floors. Keerthi Royal Palms offers an array of premium amenities, including a clubhouse, a refreshing gym, a well-maintained swimming pool, and a vibrant kids' play area, making it an ideal community for families.::::::Locality::::::Conveniently located next to the BMW Showroom on Hosur Road, this flat is just 500 meters from the Infosys Campus and the upcoming metro station, providing excellent connectivity. Essential services such as schools, hospitals, and malls/supermarkets are all within 1 km, ensuring that all your daily needs are met. Banks and ATMs are also nearby, and public transport options are readily available.

resultList.dtldesc: Indulge in lavish living with this stunning 4 BHK villa for sale in Block 5th Ullal, Bangalore, offering spacious and elegant interiors, perfect for a modern lifestyle.Property SpecificationsThis furnished 4 BHK villa offers a carpet area of 1290 sqft and spans across the ground floor and two additional floors in a Ground2 configuration. The villa comes with wardrobes, lights, a TV unit, kitchen cabinets, and fans, providing a ready-to-move-in option for buyers.The ground floor features one bedroom, a bathroom attached with western fittings and a geyser, a living cum dining room, a normal kitchen, and an external staircase. The first floor comprises one bedroom, a bathroom attached with western fittings and a geysersolar water heater, a separate living and dining area, a modular kitchen with a chimney, and a balcony attached to the bedroom offering a view of the road.The second floor includes two bedrooms, each with an attached bathroom with western fittings and a geysersolar water heater, a living cum study room, and a balcony attached to one of the bedrooms overlooking the road. The flooring is a mix of vitrified tiles and marble, adding a touch of elegance to the interiors. The villa is Vaastu compliant and faces east, ensuring harmony and positive energy flow throughout the home.Facilities This villa offers covered parking facilities, ensuring the safety and convenience of residents vehicles. Water supply is available from both borewell and corporation sources, ensuring a reliable water supply. Additionally, there is a 100 power backup facility, ensuring uninterrupted power supply. For security, there is a dedicated security guard and CCTV cameras installed, providing a safe and secure environment for residents.Locality Located next to the Manganahalli Cross bus stop and near Chaitanya PU College, this villa in Block 5th Ullal, Bangalore, enjoys a prime location. Hospitals are within 100 meters, ensuring quick access to healthcare services.Malls, supermarkets, banks, and ATMs are nearby, providing convenience for daily needs and financial transactions. The area is well-connected by public transport, with the Dyandharati and Kengeri metro stations located 6 km and 2 km away, respectively, simplifying commuting for residents.

resultList.dtldesc: Approved by the Bruhat Bengaluru Mahanagara Palike, this 3BHK flat located in Keerthi Royale, Banaswadi, one of the upscale residential areas of Bangalore is worth investing your hard-earned money. Every inch of this abode is efficiently and generously designed to give you more comfort and convenience.Note - This is a large 3 BHK duplex flat with ground and mezzanine floors.Property SpecificationsWith a carpet area of 1800 sqft, this flat is blessed with an abundance of natural light and fresh air. South-facing, this abode is an ideal choice to live a healthy and wealthy life with your loved ones. Ready to move in, this semi-furnished flat comprises a living room, dining area, a kitchen, 1store room, 3 bedrooms, 3 balconies and 3 bathrooms. In terms of furnishing details, the bedrooms have wardrobes for storage purposes and all the rooms are outfitted with electrical fixtures such as fans and lights. The modular kitchen is well-equipped with a chimney, cabinets, granite platform and sink. In addition, there is a utility attached to the kitchen which is an added advantage.All the bathrooms are fashioned in a western manner and are attached to the bedrooms. Additionally, all these bathrooms have geysers installed for hot water supply. Offering a clear view of the other building, 2 balconies are individually connected to the living room  dining area while the remaining balcony is linked to the master bedroom. Moreover, the flooring of this flat is covered with vitrified tiles.FacilitiesTwo covered reserved parking, 24 hours water supply, 100 power backup, 1 lift, rainwater harvesting, swimming pool, gym, water storage, kids play area, servicegoods lift, park and multipurpose courts are the prime facilitiesamenities available in this apartment. For safety reasons, a security guard is appointed to keep a close watch and CCTV cameras are installed for 24x7 surveillance.LocalityThis property is located on the main Banaswadi Ring Road with close proximity to all facilities. A number of top-rated schools, reputed hospitals and well-known supermarkets are situated within a range of 500 meters while the mall is 2 km away. Also, noted banksATM centers can be found easily.Different types of public transportation such as buses, autos and taxis are immediately available whereas the KR Puram Railway Station and the Bayyapanahalli Metro Station are accessible at a 3 km distance. Hence, commuting tofrom this locality is quite convenient.

Ready with vitrified tiles for the flooring, this beautiful flat presents well-ventilated and naturally bright rooms where you can experience peace of mind and positivity. Designed with precision, the semi-furnished home features 2 bedrooms where you can relax after a hectic day. There are also 2 western-style bathrooms, one of which is attached to the master bedroom and the other is available for common use, both the bathrooms are equipped with geyser points. The home has a separate living and dining area and a balcony, attached to the living area, provides a clear view of the road. Moreover, the modular kitchen is fitted with a chimney, a granite platform, a stainless steel sink, and comes with a utility area, adding to the convenience of daily chores. Facilities Sobha Dream Acres offers an unparalleled range of facilities like covered parking space, 24-hour water borewell and Corporation supply, 100 power backup, two lifts, a security guard, and CCTV surveillance ensuring peace of mind. Residents can indulge in world-class amenities such as a rainwater harvesting, club house, swimming pool, gymnasium, park, reserved parking, water storage, private terracegarden, servicegoods lift, air-conditioned, internetWi-Fi connectivity, DTH television facility, RO water system, banquet hall, barlounge, concierge services, dance studio, early learning center, event space  amphitheater, and cafeteriafood court.Additional amenities include a conference room, jogging and strolling track, outdoor tennis courts, aerobics room, arts  craft studio, barbeque pit, canopy walk, coffee lounge  restaurants, bank  ATM, kids club, kids play area, meditation area, multipurpose courts, outdoor tennis courts, recreational pool, rentable community space, retail boulevard retail shops, activity deck, cycling  jogging track, and fire fighting equipment. Locality Situated within the renowned Sobha Dream Acres development, this flat enjoys proximity to key urban amenities. Moreover, cabs, taxis, buses and autos are readily available, and the upcoming metro station is just 2 km away, promising excellent connectivity. Some of the prominent schools are at 1km which makes it an ideal destination for a family with children. In case of medical emergencies, you can rush to the hospitals that are 1km away. Several supermarkets and shopping malls are all within a 1 km radius, catering to everyday needs effortlessly.
